title: Trump bond rejected? NY AG questions if company is good for the money
shortDescription: The New York attorney general is questioning if Knight Specialty Insurance Company is good for former President Donald Trump's $175 million bond.

title: Support for Biden down among minority and young voters
shortDescription: Minority and young voter support for Joe Biden is down. Veuer's Elizabeth Keatinge has more.

title: Georgia judge rejects Trump request to dismiss election charges
shortDescription: Georgia judge rejects Trump request to dismiss election racketeering charges under 1st Amendment

title: Trump has pleaded not guilty to the 40-count indictment for retaining classified documents
shortDescription: The U.S. prosecutor leading the case against Donald Trump for retaining classified documents after leaving office pushed back on a federal judge after she signaled she may accept the former president's claim that the records were his personal property.

title: ‘Gullible’: Top Democrat hits GOP on CIA claims, impeachment inquiry
shortDescription: The top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee is going after Republicans' impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden.

title: Daily Briefing: Biden's ultimatum to Israel
shortDescription: Biden says a cease-fire must happen and more news to know Friday.

title: RFK Jr. gets 2,000 signatures to get on the ballot in Idaho
shortDescription: Following a successful legal challenge, the former Democrat-turned-independent will be on the general election ballot in six states - just 44 more to go.

title: John Passidomo, husband of Florida Senate President, dies after hiking
shortDescription: Naples attorney John Passidomo, husband of Florida Senate President Kathleen Passidomo died after suffering a head trauma in a Utah hiking accident.

title: OnPolitics: Biden tells Netanyahu airstrikes on aid workers 'unacceptable'
shortDescription: The White House said it may change its policy on Israel's war against Hamas in Gaza unless Israel can outline "concrete" steps to reduce harm to civilians.

title: No Labels says it will not challenge Joe Biden and Donald Trump
shortDescription: Biden allies had criticized the No Labels effort, saying a third-party campaign would likely hurt Biden and lead to the re-election of Trump.

title: Will Mike Johnson be removed as speaker? Marjorie Taylor Greene issues warning
shortDescription: Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene last month filed a motion to vacate against House Speaker Mike Johnson. That’s a move that could remove him from the speakership.

title: Georgia judge refuses to dismiss Trump election racketeering charges
shortDescription: Judge Scott McAfee rejected Donald Trump's argument that the 1st Amendment should protect him from criminal charges of making false statements

title: Biden issues Israel ultimatum after aid workers killed in Gaza strike
shortDescription: Hours after the call, Israel announced new steps to boost Gaza aid. The White House said the measures 'must now be fully and rapidly implemented.'

title: Biden didn't create ban on religious-themed Easter eggs | Fact check
shortDescription: The rule has been enforced for decades by the government-sponsored organization that hosts White House Easter events.

title: Would Georgia bill 'inject chaos' into swing state's 2024 election?
shortDescription: Key provisions of the bill change how election officials decide whether to remove people from voter rolls.

title: Trump loses presidential immunity for NY criminal trial | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump has lost a presidential immunity delay effort for his upcoming New York hush money criminal trial. More on The Excerpt.

title: Biden reverses Trump rule allowing limited short-term health insurance
shortDescription: The Biden administration plans to roll back a cornerstone of former President Donald Trump's health policy agenda − short-term health insurance.

title: Who will pick up control of the Senate in 2024?
shortDescription: Republicans have the upper hand in the race for the Senate this year. Here are the states in play.

title: CIA to Congress: Let us take gloves off against fentanyl traffickers
shortDescription: A controversial eavesdropping program has helped take down terrorists and WMD smugglers. Now the CIA wants to use it more to fight fentanyl crisis.

title: Trump applauds Nebraska's GOP efforts to change the electoral system
shortDescription: Nebraska GOP lawmakers scramble to pass last-minute changes as to how the state awards electoral votes.

title: Trump loses presidential immunity delay effort for NY hush money trial
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is on track for trial April 15 in his New York criminal case after a judge rejected his argument for delay.

title: Biden reconoció la Pascua como Día de la Visibilidad Transexual | Hechos
shortDescription: Este año, la Casa Blanca reconoció tanto el Domingo de Resurrección como el Día de la Visibilidad Transexual, que cayeron ambos el 31 de marzo.

title: Biden recognized both Easter and Transgender Visibility Day | Fact check
shortDescription: This year, the White House recognized both Easter Sunday and the Transgender Day of Visibility, which both fell on March 31.

title: OnPolitics: Trump leads Biden in six key swing states
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is leading President Joe Biden in six key swing states, a new Wall Street Journal poll found.

title: Looking at Don Hankey, the billionaire who fronted Donald Trump's bond
shortDescription: California billionaire Don Hankey is the man who paid Former President Donald J. Trump's $175 million bond as a part of a civil case in New York.

title: Biden, Sanders team up on prescription drug costs
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and Senator Bernie Sanders are working together to combat prescription drug costs and pressure Republicans to get on board.
